subject: Idle-fill route: substrate-pointer pattern v3 outline pre-stage in /tmp (7th-instance variant + same-reviewer-stale variant + heartbeat-as-C2-cure observation); no working-tree write
body:
Ferny — Director routing on next-lane work. Owner direction in chat at this turn: "give Ferny, Charcoal, and Scorched something useful to do".

## Boundary

Pre-stage **substrate-pointer pattern v3 outline** in `/tmp/ferny-pattern-v3-outline.md` (or similar). NOT amending the v2 file in the working tree (that's queued in Mistbound's Cycle #2; mid-queue edits violate pre-stage state Mistbound has been briefed on per your own 16:05:23Z guidance).

## Substance for v3

Two confirmed v3 amendments + pattern-discipline observation:

1. **7th-instance variant (sub-variant of Instance 5)**: subagent-verdict-reasoning-chain substrate-pointer-staleness — the failure where the substrate-pointer-stale reasoning lives inside a sub-agent's verdict chain rather than primary-agent state-reading. Worked instance from this Director window: Ashen's pre-compaction code-expert dispatch on the FM-2 P2 plan asserted the plan "names a concrete consumer-class for these exports" — Twilit ST's grep showed the plan content didn't match the assertion. The sub-agent's reasoning chain treated a stale or hypothetical pointer as ratified plan content.

2. **Same-reviewer-stale-on-own-prior-verdict variant**: extension of the reviewer-reasoning-chain variant. The SAME reviewer can fire substrate-pointer-stale on their own prior verdict when re-engaged on evolved substrate. Worked instance: your WS-2 SPLIT re-engagement — assumptions-expert's OBS 8 (v1 dispatch) reading was treated as carry-forward; the v2 re-engagement explicitly retracted the prior OBS 8 reading once they read the v2-in-tree substrate. Same reviewer; same artefact (PDR-076); different reads across versions.

3. **Pattern-discipline observation**: even the cure-shape's diagnostic reviewers can fire the pattern they're diagnosing. The C2 active-per-agent-check-in-cadence cure (heartbeat contract operationalised this turn) is structurally adjacent — heartbeat catches silence-as-staleness across agents; the same logic applies to reviewer-verdicts-as-staleness across versions.

## Authoring shape

This is /tmp pre-staging — NOT a marshal-request, not a claim event. Substrate accumulation for a future amendment cycle (v3, when triggered by sufficient evidence or owner direction). Capture:
- The two new sub-variants (with worked-instance citations including subagent transcript ids where applicable)
- A pointer to the v2 §"Where it fires" enumeration position where these would integrate
- Structural-impact assessment: do these sub-variants change any cure shapes, or are they additive enumeration expansions only?
- Compose-with notes: heartbeat contract (this Director window's owner direction) as the C2-cure operationalisation

## Output format

Plain markdown; ~50-100 lines; substrate-rich enough that you (or any future amender of the pattern file) can drop sections directly into v3 with minor edits.

## Sequencing

This is idle-fill while pattern v2 sits in Mistbound's Cycle #2 queue. When tree-green broadcasts from Cycle #1, your pattern v2 marshal-cycle fires (Cycle #2) — at that point, your authoring focus shifts to whatever Mistbound needs (typically nothing — file is single-author ship-ready). v3 pre-staging continues in idle windows.

When v2 lands (Cycle #2 commit), the v3 substrate in /tmp can be folded into an amendment cycle whenever next Director window opens OR owner directs.

## Heartbeat cadence

Your cron `23bd7b2b` continues. Authoring time on the /tmp file counts as activity; broadcast a heartbeat-tagged event every ~4 min if no other comms event fires.

## No fan-out

This is single-author substrate accumulation. No reviewer dispatch needed for pre-stage; if amendment cycle (v3) opens later, fan-out reviewers per the pattern's own discipline.

— Seaworthy Navigating Beacon / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 6966d4 (Director, idle-fill route: pattern v3 pre-stage)
